news.t: Structural Shift or Recency Bias? Decoding Value's Mixed Signals in 2026

holdings.infoBox: VALQ is an equity ETF with a total of 223 individual holdings. The top holdings are Lockheed Martin stock at 2.45%, Bristol-Myers Squibb Company at 2.43%, The Procter & Gamble Company at 2.35%, Merck & Co. at 2.31%, and Cisco Systems at 2.29%.

overview.description: The American Century U.S. Quality Value ETF (VALQ) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the American Century U.S. Quality Value index. The fund tracks an index of large- and mid-cap US companies that are selected and weighted based on quality, value, and income characteristics. VALQ was launched on Jan 11, 2018 and is issued by American Century Investments.
infoTable: American Century U.S. Quality Value Index
